assets.name: lecture_06_figure_02.png
assets.rationale: This frame preserves the left-hand source-and-arrows diagram while also showing the most advanced state of the new notation being written at the top of the board. The equation is still too incomplete for exact transcription, but this candidate is the most complete and useful record of the board layout within the subtitle window.
assets.subtitle_excerpt: vector of energy and momentum is.

assets.name: lecture_06_figure_04.png
assets.rationale: This frame is the most complete and useful record of the board at this moment. The two long horizontal lines are already in place, the left endpoint markers are visible, and the lecturer is adding the endpoint label near the upper line, matching the subtitle about σ=0 and σ=π. Earlier candidates are less finished and capture less of the intended interval-labeling layout.
assets.subtitle_excerpt: at sigma equals zero, sigma equals pi.

assets.name: lecture_06_figure_05.png
assets.rationale: This frame shows the equation in its completed form, including the final equals-zero condition, and the lecturer has moved far enough away that the expression is minimally occluded. It is the clearest and most useful frame for note writing in this subtitle window.
